Build shared design matrices (family-agnostic)

Source: R/to_stan_data.R
dot-to_stan_data_shared.Rd

Always includes the Intercept column in X. Does NOT pack priors or do family-specific type casting. Used by both to_stan_data() (joint path) and .bvar_nodewise() (mixed path).

Usage

.to_stan_data_shared(
  data,
  id_col,
  time_col,
  y_cols,
  x_cols,
  center_x = FALSE,
  fe_interactions = NULL,
  re_interactions = NULL,
  re_cols = character(0),
  re_temporal = FALSE,
  K,
  na_action = "listwise",
  skip_lag = TRUE
)

Value

A list with p, J, K, n_obs, n_fe, n_re, id, Y, X, B, Z, id_levels, x_center_means, row_map, n_rows_data, design_spec, fe_interaction_terms, fe_interaction_colnames.

On this page
